title: Identification of Promising Genotypes
author: Ding Mingliang
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.984h9yw

steps.title: Average the yield data generated for...
steps.instruction: Average the yield data generated for genotypes across locations and years.

steps.title: Perform the Welch’s variance-weighted analysis of...
steps.instruction: Perform the Welch’s variance-weighted analysis of variance for studied genotypes (across years and locations), at each location (across genotypes and years) and for each year (across genotypes and locations) using One-Way ANOVA model of SAS University Edition version 3.8 with Levene test for homogeneity of variance and adopting Tukey comparison method.

steps.title: Calculate mean genetic deviation in successive cycles
steps.instruction: Calculate mean genetic deviation in successive cycles

steps.title: Corresponding above mean values facilitate the...
steps.instruction: Corresponding above mean values facilitate the partitioning of promising genotypes, location and years
